description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly matte black finish accented by teal highlights along the receiver and stock. The rifle is equipped with a long, heavy barrel and a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting at long distances. The stock is angular and adjustable, with a contoured cheek rest and a robust buttpad for stability and comfort. The trigger guard is pronounced, and the magazine appears to be detachable, located just ahead of the trigger. The fore-end is streamlined, with subtle texturing for grip, and the overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials. The rifle's design is tactical and ergonomic, suitable for urban marksmen or law enforcement applications.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, and angular adjustable stock, finished in matte black with teal accents. Designed for precision and stability, it features a detachable magazine and ergonomic grip surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, scope lens, and narrow profile of the barrel and fore-end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, scope, angular stock, and teal accent lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the buttpad, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope with the stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger guard, and additional teal detailing along the receiver.
